programs.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programs.desc: Capt. Glenn reprimands the crew as recent slip-ups are directly affecting communication and morale; Daisy breaks down when she's proven wrong about the walkies not working; chef Ileisha is determined to prove she can complete a 10-course dinner.

programs.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programs.desc: Capt. Glenn is proud of the crew for knocking out a pride charter, but has to deliver bad news; after Gary learns about Mads' three-way kiss, he starts flirting more with Daisy, leading Colin to voice his concerns; Colin throws a gossip grenade.

programs.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programs.desc: Capt. Glenn threatens to kick one of the throuple charter guests off during a drunken guest fight; Mads receives a wake-up call that prompts her to dismiss Gary's apology attempt.

programs.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programs.sub_title: Man Buns It Has Been Fun
programs.desc: Proud of his team's accomplishments during the final sail, Capt. Glenn believes his tough love made them all stronger; the crew celebrates its final night out, and Daisy and Colin try to soak up every moment of it.

programs.title: Below Deck Down Under
programs.desc: Chef Ben begins to feel Daisy no longer has his back and when a demanding charter guest sends him spiraling in the galley, her attempt to step in only deepens the rift between the two heads of department.

programs.title: Below Deck Down Under
programs.sub_title: Head of the Deck; Stew Department
programs.desc: Chef Ben and Jenna try to take their flirtations to the next level, but Eddy's jealousy and Mike's interference get in the way. After Mike crosses a line with Daisy, tensions explode across the boat. Crew gossip sparks a room swap.
